'''Lorrad''' was a dirty, [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|urbanised]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Allied Tion sector/Legends|Allied Tion sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Prior to [[300 BBY/Legends|300 BBY]] it had been dominated by [[Barseg]] for millennia, enslaving the Lorradians in harrowing condition and forcing them to work in heavy-machinery factories producing tools, [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]], and [[H-12 copter]]s. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] liberated Lorrad from the [[Kingdom of Barseg]] in 300 BBY, but Barseg's economic domination of the planet continued.<ref name="Lianna">''[[Mission to Lianna]]''</ref>

The planet shared its name with [[Lorrad Flightworks]].<ref name="Geonosis">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
